data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of re-signing when terms update, as specified in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the system's behavior in notifying users to re-sign or the mechanism for handling updated terms. The absence of any checks or confirmations regarding this specific requirement indicates a clear gap in the validation process.
gaps: No evidence of system notifying active climbers to re-sign when waiver language is updated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for re-sign notification process
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the system sends notifications to users for re-signing when terms are updated.
